summary: Reframed the opening around the prior night's Mars hold and Spike's active morning search, then tightened the exit timing so the handoff into the late-light Hellas pursuit lands cleaner.
edits: Shifted the opening away from a place-led scaffold to a direct continuation of the previous chapter's overnight decision.
Made Spike's first beat an active check of the old route instead of leading on broad Mars description.
Changed the departure handoff to cue arrival at the basin in failing light, matching the next chapter's opening conditions.
